description: Creates a spending limit for a specified quantum device. Spending limits help you control costs by setting maximum amounts that can be spent on quantum computing tasks within a specified time period.

TimePeriod.description: Defines a time range for spending limits, specifying when the limit is active.

StartAt.description: The start date and time for the spending limit period, in ISO 8601 format.
StartAt.markdownDescription:
The start date and time for the spending limit period, in ISO 8601 format.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

EndAt.description: The end date and time for the spending limit period, in ISO 8601 format.
EndAt.markdownDescription:
The end date and time for the spending limit period, in ISO 8601 format.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

TimePeriod.markdownDescription:
Defines a time range for spending limits, specifying when the limit is active.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.description: A key-value pair to associate with a resource.

Key.description: The key name of the tag.
Key.markdownDescription:
The key name of the tag.

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.markdownDescription:

Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.markdownDescription:

SpendingLimitArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the spending limit.
SpendingLimitArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the spending limit.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[a-z\-]*:braket:[a-z0-9\-]+:[0-9]{12}:spending-limit/.*$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

DeviceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the quantum device to apply the spending limit to.
DeviceArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the quantum device to apply the spending limit to.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: Replacement

SpendingLimit.description: The maximum amount that can be spent on the specified device, in USD.
SpendingLimit.markdownDescription:
The maximum amount that can be spent on the specified device, in USD.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Pattern: ^\d+(\.\d{1,2})?$  
Update requires: No interruption

QueuedSpend.description: The amount currently queued for spending on the device, in USD.
QueuedSpend.markdownDescription:
The amount currently queued for spending on the device, in USD.

Update requires: No interruption
